priority_actions.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
Address recurring food quality complaints from guests
Lean into service & hospitality — it's what guests are buying

watch_items.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
Monitor local competitor openings and closures

implementation_framework.title: Below local median — competitive risk
implementation_framework.success_measure: Overall score percentile improved vs local peers (verifiable via next scoring run)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the 3 competitor profiles listed in this report. Note what they do on Google that you don't. Pick one gap to close this week

implementation_framework.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
implementation_framework.success_measure: GBP completeness ≥ 9/10 with menu and hours complete (verifiable via API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Open your Google Maps listing on your phone. Check: (1) hours for all 7 days, (2) menu link works, (3) phone number dials correctly, (4) website loads. Fix any gaps via business.google.com
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: operations — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Address recurring food quality complaints from guests
implementation_framework.expected_upside: Reduce food quality complaints, protect rating
implementation_framework.success_measure: No food quality complaints in next 10 reviews (verifiable via sentiment analysis)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Pull up the 3 most recent negative reviews. Identify the common theme. Brief the head chef and FOH manager together on the pattern this week
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: operations — head chef + FOH manager to review together

implementation_framework.title: Lean into service & hospitality — it's what guests are buying
implementation_framework.expected_upside: Sharpen proposition → attract the right guests
implementation_framework.success_measure: Service-related praise maintained in next review sample (verifiable via sentiment)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Update your GBP description and website homepage to lead with what guests actually praise: service quality and hospitality
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: management — FOH lead or general manager

implementation_framework.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
implementation_framework.success_measure: Google rating maintained or improved vs current baseline (verifiable via gr field)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Respond to the 3 most recent Google reviews (positive and negative) this week. Set a weekly review-response routine
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: front-of-house — whoever currently responds to online reviews

implementation_framework.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
implementation_framework.success_measure: Overall score percentile improved vs local peers (verifiable via next scoring run)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the 3 competitor profiles listed in this report. Note what they do on Google that you don't. Pick one gap to close this week
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: management — whoever currently responds to online reviews

implementation_framework.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
implementation_framework.success_measure: FSA rating maintained or improved on next inspection (verifiable via FSA API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the last FSA inspection report. Address each specific point. When ready, request a re-inspection via your local authority

implementation_framework.title: Guest experience trailing local competitors
implementation_framework.success_measure: Overall score percentile improved vs local peers (verifiable via next scoring run)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the 3 competitor profiles listed in this report. Note what they do on Google that you don't. Pick one gap to close this week

implementation_framework.title: Compliance record trailing local standards
implementation_framework.success_measure: FSA rating maintained or improved on next inspection (verifiable via FSA API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Review the last FSA inspection report. Address each specific point. When ready, request a re-inspection via your local authority

implementation_framework.title: Address repeated atmosphere & setting complaints from guests
implementation_framework.expected_upside: Reduce atmosphere & setting complaints, protect rating
implementation_framework.success_measure: No food quality complaints in next 10 reviews (verifiable via sentiment analysis)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Pull up the 3 most recent negative reviews. Identify the common theme. Brief the head chef and FOH manager together on the pattern this week
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: operations — head chef + FOH manager to review together

implementation_framework.title: Ranked #6 of 9 locally — peers are ahead
implementation_framework.success_measure: Signal improvement detectable in next month's data collection
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Identify the single most actionable sub-task and assign it to a named person with a deadline

theatre_goers.label: Theatre-Goers / Event Visitors

top_praise.example_quote: This was our second visit to The Vinter, & it didn’t disappoint
Vintner provided great pre-theatre service helped us get to our showing on time
This was our second visit to The Vinter, & it didn’t disappoint

theatre_goers.commercial_note: This segment values speed and predictability — they have a hard deadline. Late service or unclear pre-theatre options lose them entirely.

couples.label: Couples & Occasion Diners

top_praise.example_quote: This latest meal was outstanding despite its simplicity
My husband and I had a superb meal at the Vintner on Feb 14

couples.commercial_note: Occasion diners have high expectations and long memories. A great experience generates word-of-mouth; a disappointing one generates damaging reviews.

tourists.label: Tourists & Visitors

top_praise.example_quote: Cannot recommend enough, excellent food, amazing service and a lovely atmosphere
Cannot recommend enough, excellent food, amazing service and a lovely atmosphere

tourists.commercial_note: Tourists discover you online with no prior loyalty. Your listing, photos, and first 3 reviews are the entire decision basis.

locals.label: Locals & Regulars

top_praise.example_quote: This was our second visit to The Vinter, & it didn’t disappoint
This was our second visit to The Vinter, & it didn’t disappoint
This latest meal was outstanding despite its simplicity

locals.commercial_note: Regulars are your revenue baseline. They tolerate minor issues but notice declining consistency. Losing a regular costs 50+ future visits.

tensions.note: Tourists & Visitors need online proof to choose you. Locals & Regulars need consistency to stay. Investing in digital presence serves discovery; investing in consistency serves retention. Both matter.

data_quality.note: Honest segment attribution from keyword evidence. Reviews without clear guest-type signals are unattributed.
